_meta.title: Soldut — Style anchor (no ControlNet, no IP-Adapter)
_meta.description: Generates a single-image style reference used as the IP-Adapter input by the canonical workflow. Strips ControlNet and IP-Adapter (chicken/egg — anchor IS the IP-Adapter input). Leans on prompt-only to produce one 'Battletech-TRO ink-on-paper' image at 768x768. Run a few times with different seeds; pick the cleanest as <chassis>_anchor_v1.png.

inputs.text: battletech technical readout illustration, single-weight black ink line on aged paper, mecha line art, stencil, factory production drawing, panel lines, hydraulic seams, exposed pistons, full-body battlemech, t-pose, no shading, no gradient, no glow, halftone, monochrome, paper texture, 1985 illustration, factory production catalog page

photo, 3d, render, smooth shading, gradient, glow, bloom, soft, painterly, anime face, character, person, color, saturated, neon, cyberpunk, ambient occlusion, depth of field, blur, antialiased line, watermark, signature, text, multiple objects
